mnemonics: My Own Unix System Interface Task
keyPoints: The operating system interacts with the user through a command-line interface or graphical user interface (GUI).
The operating system provides a standard interface for users to communicate with the computer.
The user interface is designed to simplify the interaction between the user and the computer.
The operating system also provides a layer of abstraction between the hardware and the user, making it easier to use the computer.
The interface can be customized to suit individual preferences and needs.
Some common features of the user interface include menus, icons, buttons, and windows.
